summary: Iteration 22: Complete testing of NEW interaction patterns - shared room, synth room, daisy chain, synthesis bar, and context settings. Backend: 14/14 tests PASSED. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Mode Selector: All 4 mode buttons (Normal, Shared Room, Synth Room, Daisy Chain) present and functional
Shared Room mode: Rounds input appears when selected, multi-model responses work correctly
Synth Room mode: Synth model select dropdown appears when mode is selected
Daisy Chain mode: Sequential model→model responses working - first model response shown to second model with [Chain Round X, Step Y] context
Context Panel: Toggle shows Global Context textarea + Per-Model Context fields (Role, System message, Prompt modifier) for each selected model
Synthesis Bar: Appears when response checkmarks are clicked, contains synthesis prompt input, model selector, synthesize button, and clear button
Backend /api/v1/a0/shared-room: Returns concurrent responses from multiple models
Backend /api/v1/a0/daisy-chain: Returns sequential responses with each model seeing previous response
Backend /api/v1/a0/synthesize: Works with source_message_ids from prior responses
Backend /api/v1/a0/prompt: Accepts global_context and per_model_context parameters
Thread History: Shows all conversation types (normal, shared room, daisy chain, synthesis) correctly
Layout toggles (Stack, Split, Carousel) still working from previous iteration
seed_data_creation: Multiple threads created: Daisy Chain threads (5), Shared Room threads (4+), Synthesis threads (1+), Normal threads (5+). All properly persisted and loadable from thread history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested NEW interaction patterns: shared room (POST /api/v1/a0/shared-room), daisy chain (POST /api/v1/a0/daisy-chain), synthesize (POST /api/v1/a0/synthesize), and context settings (global_context, per_model_context). All 4 mode buttons work. Context panel shows Global Context + Per-Model fields. Synthesis bar appears when selecting responses. Backend tests use 60-120s timeout for LLM calls. All LLM calls are real via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.

details.synthesize_basic: PASS - Gets message IDs from prompt, synthesizes them

details.shared_room_button: Found at [data-testid='mode-shared_all'], shows Rounds input when selected
details.synth_room_button: Found at [data-testid='mode-shared_synth'], shows Synth model select when selected
details.daisy_chain_button: Found at [data-testid='mode-daisy'], shows Rounds input when selected

details.per_model_context: Shows for each selected model with Role, System message, Prompt modifier inputs

details.send_prompt: Sent 'What is 3+3? Answer in one word only.'
Sent 'Name one animal. Answer in one word.'

details.load_previous_thread: Clicking Shared Room thread loads messages correctly

mocked_apis.details: All LLM calls are real using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY

features_verified: Mode selector: Normal, Shared Room, Synth Room, Daisy Chain buttons all visible and clickable
Mode selector: Rounds input appears for Shared Room, Synth Room, and Daisy Chain modes
Mode selector: Synth model select appears for Synth Room mode
Context panel: Toggle button shows/hides panel
Context panel: Global Context textarea visible
Context panel: Per-Model Context shows Role, System message, Prompt modifier for each selected model
Synthesis bar: Checkmark button on each response panel
Synthesis bar: Bar appears when responses selected with prompt input, model select, synthesize button
Normal mode: Single model responds correctly
Shared Room mode: Multiple models respond concurrently
Daisy Chain mode: Models respond sequentially, each seeing previous response
Thread history: Shows all conversation types (normal, shared room, daisy chain, synthesis)
Thread history: Clicking thread loads messages correctly
Backend: POST /api/v1/a0/prompt accepts global_context and per_model_context
Backend: All new endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Layout toggles: Stack, Split, Carousel still working
